description: The 10th anniversary online event for the Mahou Shoujo Madoka☆Magica anime revealed that the franchise is getting a new anime film titled Mahou Shoujo Madoka☆Magica: Walpurgis no Kaiten. The film will be an official sequel to the Mahou Shoujo Madoka☆Magica: Hangyaku no Monogatari film that opened in October 2013. The tagline on the new film's visual reads, "Now, let's continue the story."(Source: Anime News Network, edited)

title: Devil May Cry Season 2
alternative: DMC S2, Devil May Cry 2nd Season
titles: Devil May Cry 2, DMC Season 2, Devil May Cry Anime S2
native: デビル メイ クライ Season 2

title: Yowayowa Teacher (Uncensored)
description:
When the new term starts, second-year student Abikura discovers that his homeroom teacher is none other than Hiyori Hiwamura, infamously known as "Scary-Scary Sensei," a woman rumored to curse anyone who crosses her.

But one day, Abikura accidentally witnesses a completely unexpected side of his fearsome teacher after school. The striking contrast between her fearsome image and her hidden personality is utterly irresistible!

Brace yourself for Gap Moe overload in this tender romantic comedy that's sure to ignite your protective instincts!

title: +Himitsu no AiPri 3rd Season
titles: +Himitsu no AiPri 3rd Season, Onegai AiPri, おねがいアイプリ
description: The new anime's story centers on Konomi Inori, a first year middle school student who just moved to the town of Onegai. At the town's plaza, Konomi prayed to the goddess statue to give her a chance to be an AiPri. After she prayed, she accidentally meets the famous AiPri Aoi Yumemiya and a mysterious talking stuffed toy with her named Fortu. It turns out that Fortu is looking for an AiPri who can make their wish come true, and when Konomi opened the special mirror pact that Aoi handed her, she gets the AiPri debut that she prayed for.

title: Dandelion
titles: Dandelion, だんでらいおん
description: Set within the Send-Off Department of the Japanese Angel Federation, follows "Angels" Tetsuo Tanba and Misaki Kurogane as they scramble to track down Earthbound spirits—souls unable to move on and find peace—and gently guide them to pass on.  The angels find themselves struggling to meet their daily tasks. However, Tetsuo Tanba and his leader, Misaki Kurogane, who make up the 21st Division's Dandelion Clan, chose to take things at their own pace: instead of rushing through cases, they take time with each spirit, listening to their regrets and helping them resolve what's holding them back.  One day, they encounter the Earthbound spirit of an elderly man who is running at full speed, trying desperately to escape.

title: Against the Gods 2nd Season
titles: Nitian Xie Shen 2nd Season, 逆天邪神 第二季, Nitian Xie Shen: Nian Fan, 逆天邪神 年番, Against the Gods 2nd Season
description:
Second season of . In the Cangyun Continent, the Medicine Sage Yun Gu was brutally murdered due to possessing one of the Seven Heavenly Treasures, the Sky Poison Pearl, which made it the object of desire for the entire realm. Yun Che, his disciple, carried the treasure to seek revenge for his master and caused boundless bloodshed in the process. Eventually, he was cornered by formidable foes at the Desolate Sky Cliff. Unyielding, Yun Che swallowed the poison pearl and leaped off the cliff to his death.

However, guided by an unknown power, his consciousness traversed time and space, awakening in the body of a young boy named Xiao Che in the Flowing Cloud City of the Tianxuan Continent. Xiao Che was born with damaged profound veins, rendering him unable to cultivate profound energy. He was widely ridiculed as a renowned waste within Flowing Cloud City. Due to a pact between their parents, he unexpectedly married Xia Qingyue, the most beautiful woman in the city and a disciple of the Ice Wind Immortal Palace.

Jealousy consumed Xiao Yulong, a member of the same clan, and on Xiao Che's wedding day, he attempted to poison him. However, thanks to Yun Che's time-traveling experience, Xiao Che managed to survive, merging the experiences of two lifetimes into one. Through a series of fortunate events, he also harbored the soul of the enigmatic and extraordinarily gifted girl, Jasmine, who resided within the Sky Poison Pearl. From then on, he embarked on a bizarre and unpredictable path filled with extraordinary challenges.

title: In Search of Gods
titles: Sou Shen Ji (ONA), 搜神记, In Search of Gods
description: The story takes place in the barbaric era of Yan Emperor and Huang Emperor. Just when many heroes were vying for supremacy in the Central Plains, the world-recognized leader, Emperor Shennong, passed away, and the heroes of the gold, wood, water, fire, and earth tribes were all ready to make a move.  In the turbulent times, the young boy Tuoba Ye suddenly appeared and by chance obtained the dying inheritance of Emperor Shennong, thus starting a thrilling legendary journey.

title: The Bloody Mary
titles: The Bloody Mary, ブラッディ・メアリー
native: ブラッディ・メアリー
description: Betty, an occult-loving girl, and Seeka, a demon, pick up gigs to make some cash.  This time, they head into a mansion rumored to be haunted by Bloody Mary... but what’s actually waiting for them inside?

title: Aliens Among Immortals
titles: Dao Yao Xing, 盗妖行, Aliens Among Immortals
description: Forced into a marriage of convenience based on mutual benefit, Jiang Yuan, an assassin from the Tai Xuan Tower, and Shao Yue, the holy maiden of the Jiu Xuan Sect, are ordered to marry. On their wedding night, they attempt an assassination, only to discover they are both immortal. To obtain the Demon-Suppressing Bell and the Demon-Controlling Bell, secret treasures of each other's sects, they transform from mortal enemies into a facade of marriage, engaging in a charade of mutual deception.  However, neither is aware that the other is also an alien survivor whose home was destroyed by the "Void." This destined couple forms an alliance amidst suspicion and testing, not only searching for the treasures transformed from a lost spaceship but also confronting the ever-watchful cultivation world, seeking hope to defeat the "Void" amidst perilous circumstances.

title: Komekami! Girls
titles: Komekami! Gaaruzu
description: This is the story of the seven-sister unit "Komekami! Girls," children of the rice deity, born from the tradition: "In a single grain of rice, seven gods reside."  When their mother(the deity of rice, or the rice-god queen) was called back in haste to the celestial realm and no longer able to return to the earthly realm they search for her traces using Usa City (Oita Prefecture) as their base, and teleport to Hachiman shrines throughout Kyushu island. As they solve local problems, they learn about food, take part in cooking battles, and grow.

title: Prelude of The Demon Hunter: Dongning Prefecture in Summer
alternative: Cang Yuan Tu Qianzhuan: Dongning Fu de Xiatian
titles: Cang Yuan Tu Qianzhuan: Dongning Fu de Xiatian, 沧元图前传 东宁府的夏天, Prelude of The Demon Hunter: Dongning Prefecture in Summer
native: 沧元图前传 东宁府的夏天
description: When disaster strikes, how can we sincerely awaken the phoenix?

title: I Got a Cheat Skill in Another World and Became Unrivaled in The Real World, Too: Real World
alternative: Isekai de Cheat Skill wo Te ni Shita Ore wa, Genjitsu Sekai wo mo Musou Suru: Level Up wa Jinsei wo Kaeta (TV Special)
titles: Iseleve, Isekai de Cheat Skill wo Te ni Shita Ore wa, Genjitsu Sekai wo mo Musou Suru: Level Up wa Jinsei wo Kaeta (TV Special), 異世界でチート能力を手にした俺は、現実世界をも無双する ～レベルアップは人生を変えた～, I Got a Cheat Skill in Another World and Became Unrivaled in The Real World, Too:
native: 異世界でチート能力を手にした俺は、現実世界をも無双する ～レベルアップは人生を変えた～
description:
All his life, Yuuya Tenjou has been the subject of resentment and contempt from everyone around him, even from his parents. To make matters worse, his grandfather—the only person who ever showed him affection—suddenly dies, leaving Yuuya truly alone.

Despite facing many adversities, Yuuya does what he can to offer kindness to those who need it—but even the most good-natured people can only tolerate so much abuse. Just when he reaches his breaking point, a flicker of hope appears in the form of a hidden door in his bathroom.

This door provides two-way access to an abandoned house in another world, where he instantly gains game-like stats and skills. Moreover, the house once belonged to a sage, which gives Yuuya access to remarkable weapons, equipment, and crops with extraordinary effects. With these newfound blessings, the once-undesirable Yuuya may just reach his true potential and become unstoppable.

title: Steel Ball Run: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
alternative: Steel Ball Run: JoJo no Kimyou na Bouken
titles: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure Part 7: Steel Ball Run, JoJo no Kimyou na Bouken Part 7: Steel Ball Run, SBR, Steel Ball Run: JoJo no Kimyou na Bouken, スティール・ボール・ラン ジョジョの奇妙な冒険, Steel Ball Run: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
native: スティール・ボール・ラン ジョジョの奇妙な冒険
description: In the American Old West, the world's greatest race is about to begin. Thousands line up in San Diego to travel over six thousand kilometers for a chance to win the grand prize of fifty million dollars. With the era of the horse reaching its end, contestants are allowed to use any kind of vehicle they wish. Competitors will have to endure grueling conditions, traveling up to a hundred kilometers a day through uncharted wastelands. The Steel Ball Run is truly a one-of-a-kind event.  The youthful Johnny Joestar, a crippled former horse racer, has come to San Diego to watch the start of the race. There he encounters Gyro Zeppeli, a racer with two steel balls at his waist instead of a gun. Johnny witnesses Gyro using one of his steel balls to unleash a fantastical power, compelling a man to fire his gun at himself during a duel. In the midst of the action, Johnny happens to touch the steel ball and feels a power surging through his legs, allowing him to stand up for the first time in two years. Vowing to find the secret of the steel balls, Johnny decides to compete in the race, and so begins his bizarre adventure across America on the Steel Ball Run.

title: Evangelion 30th Anniversary Special
titles: Evangelion Shinsaku Tanpen Animation
native: エヴァンゲリオン 放送30周年記念特別興行
description: A new short animation for the Evangelion series that debuted at the "EVANGELION:30+; 30th ANN/VERSARY OF EVANGELION" fes. in Yokohama Arena.

title: Does It Count If You Lose Your Innocence to an Android? Special
alternative: Android wa Keiken Ninzuu ni Hairimasu ka?? Special
titles: Android wa Keiken Ninzuu ni Hairimasu ka?? Special, アンドロイドは経験人数に入りますか??, Does It Count If You Lose Your Innocence to an Android? Special
native: アンドロイドは経験人数に入りますか??
description: Office Lady Tsuda Akane, age 28, seems like she's got it all together. Beautiful, brainy, and an indispensable office worker for a robotics manufacturer, Akane's admired at work...because her colleagues can't see her at home. Privately, Akane's a hot mess with an apartment that looks more like a landfill than a living space. Good thing she drunkenly ordered a new android named Nadeshiko to help her clean up! Well, maybe not good, because the beautiful lady android that arrives is a horny hottie. Akane's about to get more service than she expected!

title: BAKI-DOU The Invincible Samurai
description: Following his legendary father-son battle against Yujiro Hanma, Baki faces a new threat: the resurrection of Japan's greatest swordsman, Miyamoto Musashi. As warriors like Doppo Orochi, Jack Hanma, and Kaoru Hanayama return to the fight, the stage is set for an unprecedented clash the strongest underground fighter vs. the legendary samurai, in a cross-era showdown.

title: Martial God Asura 2
titles: Xiuluo Wushen 2, 修罗武神 第2季, Xiuluo Wushen 2nd Season, Martial God Asura 2nd Season, 修罗武神2, Martial God Asura 2
native: 修罗武神2, 修罗武神 第2季
description:
Chu Feng, a rising star in Qingzhou, accompanied Qinglong Sect Master Li Changqing to the Hundred Sects Conference, Qingzhou's premier event, where he forged a feud with the powerful and domineering Lingyun Sect Master Yan Yangtian. Little did he know, the Hundred Sects Conference, ostensibly a sect competition, was actually a shocking conspiracy by Yan Yangtian. As his strength grew, Chu Feng mastered the power of golden and blue divine thunder. However, this power accidentally disturbed the long-dormant Ice and Fire Pearls, forcing his friends Su Rou and Su Mei to be possessed by the pearls while trying to save Chu Feng, putting their lives in imminent danger.

Determined to save his friends, Chu Feng embarked on a treasure hunt in Ten Thousand Demons Mountain, vowing to rescue the Purple-Robed World Spiritist, the Demon Monkey King, and save the two Su brothers. Along the way, Chu Feng met Jiang Wushang, a young man from the imperial dynasty, and reunited with Zi Ling, a girl gifted with a divine body and a mysterious past. He finally reunited with his renowned senior from the same sect, Zhang Tianyi, founder of the Winged Alliance. Ultimately, thanks to the loyalty of Dandan, Ziling, Jiang Wushang, Zhang Tianyi, and others, and his own growing strength, Chu Feng retrieves the Shura Ghost Axe, rescues the Demon Monkey King, successfully rescues the two Su brothers, and uncovers the conspiracy of Lingyun Sect Master Yan Yangtian. Ultimately, he turns the tide and resolves the crisis in Kyushu. To unravel the mystery of his own identity, he embarks on a journey to the vast Eastern Sea...

title: Yao-Chinese Folktales 2
titles: Zhongguo Qi Tan 2, Yao-Chinese Folktales II, 中国奇谭2, Yao-Chinese Folktales 2
description: The animated short film collection "Chinese Tales 2" is jointly produced by Shanghai Animation Film Studio, Shanghai Film Studio, Bilibili, and Chen Liaoyu Studio. Chen Liaoyu is the chief director. The work brings together 12 directors to create 9 short films with different styles. The second part of the story will enter the world of fireworks. On the basis of continuing "telling Chinese stories in a Chinese way", it will focus more on the thinking and discussion of people's self-identity, family relationships, and social relationships, while continuing to show the fantasy imagination in the local context.

title: Playing Sister
titles: Onee-chan Gokko, Oneechan Gokko, お姉ちゃんごっこ, Playing Sister
description: In the distant future, Kagami Village is a suburban mountain village that has been left behind by the highly developed science and technology in urban areas. "If you're not well behaved, a look-alike will come." Higure Akane, a middle school student living in this village where an old legend still remains, was looking forward to being reunited with her older sister Higure Sui, who has been released from the hospital after a year. However, shortly after her sister's release from the hospital, Akane receives a phone call. "The person in that house is not your older sister."

title: Cosmic Princess Kaguya!
titles: Chou Kaguya-hime!, 超かぐや姫！, Cosmic Princess Kaguya!
description:
Tsukuyomi is a virtual realm where hopes and dreams come together. Iroha Sakayori, a 17-year-old high school student in Tokyo, leads an extremely busy life trying to balance part-time work and academics. She finds peace by watching a popular streamer named Yachiyo Runami, who is the administrator of an online virtual space called Tsukuyomi.

Iroha frequents Tsukuyomi, where people can live different lives and freely pursue their creativity, and she passes the time by supporting Yachiyo and playing battle games to earn a little extra money. On her way home one day, Iroha finds a telephone pole shining with iridescent hues. To her surprise, an adorable baby emerges from the pole. Unable to abandon it, Iroha takes the infant home and watches her rapidly grow into a girl her own age.

"Are you Princess Kaguya?"

The grown-up Kaguya develops a self-indulgent personality. At Kaguya's fervent request, Iroha helps her start streaming in Tsukuyomi. With Iroha as producer and songwriter and Kaguya as streamer and singer, the two grow steadily closer. Little do they know that ominous forces lie in wait, eager to take Kaguya back to the moon.

This is the tale of Princess Kaguya as never seen before.

title: You Don't Know Gunma Yet
alternative: Omae wa Mada Gunma wo Shiranai: Reiwa-ban
titles: You Don't Know Gunma Yet, Omae wa Mada Gunma wo Shiranai: Reiwa-ban, お前はまだグンマを知らない～令和版～
native: お前はまだグンマを知らない～令和版～
description: Nori Kamitsuki has recently moved to the Gunma prefecture from Chiba, following after Otoya Todoroki, a former friend who moved there in elementary school. While on the way there, he receives an ominous text message from Todoroki telling him to turn back and that once someone enters Gunma, they never return.  Ignoring the message, As Kamitsuki goes about his school life and makes new friends. These people make it their mission to prove any negative stereotypes surrounding Gunma wrong and show Kamitsuki all the ways Gunma is different from the rest of Japan—from its local foods and landmarks, the changes to its daily school life, and even the attitude of the people who live there. Gunma is widely regarded as the least popular prefecture in Japan, but they clearly don't know Gunma yet!

title: Love Through a Prism
titles: Prism Rondo, プリズム輪舞曲, Love Through a Prism
description: In early-1900s London, Lili Ichijouin, a Japanese exchange student travels to England to enroll in the prestigious Saint Thomas Art Academy. Determined to become a painter, she arrives under pressure: her parents expect her to rise to the top of her class within six months or return home.  Lili's drive intensifies when she encounters Kit Church, a gifted aristocratic student known for his talent and detachment. While Kit has devoted himself entirely to painting, Lili's sincerity and resilience begin to shift something in him. The two share little beyond their love for art, yet their relationship quickly becomes central to life at the academy.

title: Hoppe-chan: Sun Oukoku to Kuro Hoppe-dan no Himitsu
alternative: Hoppe-chan: Sun Oukoku to Kuro Hoppe-dan no Himitsu
native: ほっぺちゃん ～サン王国と黒ほっぺ団の秘密～
description: The anime's story is set in a world made of "cuteness" called Sun Kingdom. Ganso Hoppe-chan, who lost her memory, appears in the kingdom. Meanwhile, in the real world, an office worker named Hoho is slowly losing her self-esteem in her work and life, sending her on the verge of becoming lost in life. Somewhere between Ganso Hoppe-chan and Hoho's worlds, their paths cross. Back in Sun Kingdom, toxic Hoppe-chan creatures are creating an "uncute place," and Ganso Hoppe-chan joins the "Guardians" to protect the kingdom.

title: Exorcism Chronicles: The Beginning
titles: Crônicas de Exorcismo: O Início
description: Hyeon-Am trains in Tai Chi Qigong in order to fight the water ghost that killed his sister; Father Park, unable to save his friend's daughter from an unknown evil spirit, chooses to become a priest walking the path of asceticism; Jun-Hu, the only survivor of Eastern Sea Esoteric Buddhism, is a genius who has inherited all the magic of the five guardians of Esoteric Buddhism; Seung-Hui, who has a secret, gets involved in a mysterious case due to her father.An occult fantasy in which individual exorcists, each driven by their own causes, solve crimes and fight together against evil demons—demons who rule the spiritual and emotional worlds of mankind, and drive society into chaos.(Source: Naver, translated)

title: Dream Animals The Movie
titles: Tabekko Doubutsu The Movie, たべっ子どうぶつ THE MOVIE, Dream Animals The Movie
native: たべっ子どうぶつ THE MOVIE
description: It begins in Sweetsland: The home of the Dream Animals that has been taken over by cotton candy. The Tabekko Doubutsu find themselves being chased by the cotton candy army of King Gotton, who has banned all other sweets as part of his plan to take over the world. In their rush to escape, Pegasus ends up caught by the sticky soldiers!  The animals make sparkly eyes at Profession Macaron begging him to help, but their lack of battle strength paired with not knowing how to do anything but be cute to solve all of their problems, the stress of being on the run from King Gotton strains the bonds of their friendship.  Lion is discouraged by the seemingly impossible mission to rescue Pegasus, but some advice from Elephant gives him the courage he needs to act! But will it be enough to defeat King Gotton and his cotton candy army and save Pegasus — and the world?!

title: Dragon Heart: Adventures Beyond This World
titles: Dragon Heart: An Exploration of the Spirit World, Happy Science Movie 10, Dragon Heart: Reikai Tanbouki, ドラゴン・ハート―霊界探訪記―, Dragon Heart: Adventures Beyond This World
native: ドラゴン・ハート―霊界探訪記―
description: Ryusuke is a junior high school student living in Tokyo. During his summer vacation, he visits Tokushima and reunites with his teenage cousin, Tomomi. Ryusuke and Tomomi go outing to the Anabuki River where they get swept away by the rushing current.  As they sink to the bottom of the river, a dragon appears, rescues them, and takes them to a mysterious old man. The old man tells Ryusuke and Tomomi that they are already dead, but that he can send them back to life if they explore the spirit world and find their mission in life. Although perplexed with the situation, Ryusuke and Tomomi decide to begin their journey to the spirit world. First, they arrive in a gloomy town that looks like it’s from the 1960’s. Soon after, they are assailed by terrible things one after another. They see fear-ridden rogues killing one another and doctors mutilating patients. People die and rise. They get killed and rise again. Ryusuke and Tomomi realize that they are in hell. But their journey doesn’t end there. The adventure beyond this world continues into the unknown. Will they be able to find their mission in life?

title: Sword and Fairy 3
alternative: Xian Jian Qi Xia Chuan San
titles: 仙剑奇侠传三, Chinese Paladin 3, Xian Jian Qi Xia Zhuan San, Xian Jian Qi Xia Zhuan 3, Xian Jian Qi Xia Chuan San, 仙剑奇侠传叁, Sword and Fairy 3
description: A thousand years ago, the divine general Fei Peng and the Demon Sovereign Chong Lou engaged in a fierce battle in the New Immortal Realm. The divine sword "Zhao Dan" fell to the mortal world, and Fei Peng was demoted to earth. A millennium later, the Lock Demon Tower of Shu Mountain trembled, and Fei Peng's reincarnation, Jing Tian, who obtained the demonic sword, embarked on an adventure alongside Tang Xuejian, Xu Changqing, and Zi Xuan to collect the Five Spirit Orbs and seal the Lock Demon Tower.

title: Purple River 2nd Season
titles: Zichuan 2nd Season, Zi Chuan 2nd Season, 紫川 第2季, Purple River 2nd Season
description:
Two hundred years ago, on the Battlefield of the Blue River, the last remaining army of the Empire of Light collapsed in the midst of demonic outcries. As the last Field Marshal and Emperor fell, the chaotic world of the Western River no longer had a common ruler. Factions were formed and endless conflicts ensued, military might became the only currency of survival, and the dream to reunite the lands became the sole goal of many rulers in the generations that came after.

In the south-eastern part of the land, a powerful faction with over two hundred years of history – House Zichuan – fought off the Demons to the east, defended against the House Liufeng to the west, and contained the House Lin to the south. In order to accomplish their great ambitions and extend the bloodline of their family, countless heroes of Zichuan gave their lives in order to make this magnificent hymn come to life. This is a story about this legendary family and a hundred years of their blood and tears.

title: Transcend Evolution
titles: Chaofan Jinhua, 超凡进化, Transcend Evolution
description: The story follows young Ming He, whose "junk superpower" mutates into a special entity called the "Dependent Spirit" after colliding with the "Goddess" meteorite, triggering a series of adventures and crises.

title: Sora and the Big Tree
alternative: Hoshi no Kodomo to Hajimari no Ki
titles: Hoshi no Kodomo to Hajimari no Ki, 星の子どもとはじまりの樹, Sora and the Big Tree
native: 星の子どもとはじまりの樹

title: Martial Conqueror of the Cosmos
titles: Martial Shattered Galaxy, Martial Conqueror of the Cosmos, Wu Sui Xinghe, 武碎星河
description: Seeking his parents, the mountain youth Jiang Han embarks on a journey of cultivation. He accidentally activates the Celestial Beast Cauldron, a legacy left by his mother, and awakens supreme magical powers! From then on, he defies fate and changes his destiny! He battles heaven and earth! On the battlefield where the gods fell, he fights bloody battles against countless races, carving a path to the heavens with his mortal body! He vows to fight for a bright future for humanity!

title: Wind Driver In Tang Dynasty
titles: Da Tang Cheng Feng Lu, Da Tang Chengfeng Lu, Records of the Tang Dynasty, 大唐乘风录, Wind Driver in Tang Dynasty
description: The notorious divinely-skilled Mu Tianhou was suddenly ambushed, causing a stir in the martial arts world. Two upright disciples, Zheng Dongting and Zu Beiqiu (the useless brothers), met each other because of this. In order to help their younger brother Zu Beiqiu find his wife whom he had not seen for ten years, and also to find the real murderer who killed their master, a famous constable and a rich second-generation accidentally teamed up to venture into the world and embarked on an adventurous journey of delivering a divorce letter for thousands of miles.  The two came to the Luo family in Yangzhou, but encountered the Luo family's massacre and were mistaken for the murderer. They were called "the two evildoers of Central Plains." Between the two of them, Zheng Dongting has martial arts that he cannot use, while Zu Beiqiu has martial arts that he doesn't know how to use. Although the brothers intend to clear their names, the misunderstandings of the various factions in the martial arts world continue to deepen, and the righteous martial arts people rise up to attack them. After experiencing manny dangerous situations, the two discovered that this was a big conspiracy against them...

title: Paws & Palaces
titles: Forbidden City: Cat Imperial Study, Paw & Palaces, Zi Jin: Yu Miao Fang, Paw & Palaces, 紫禁·御喵房, Paws & Palaces
description: In the Forbidden City, which has a long history and profound cultural heritage, there live many cute cats. From the perspective of humans, they live an enviable and leisurely life. Among them, six royal cats are special. They are responsible for protecting the memory of cultural relics of "Wuhua." They entered the world of Wuhua and defeated the destroyer Black Owl time and time again, bringing the world of Wuhua back on the right track and thus protecting the cultural relics.  The six imperial cats are Luban and Momo from the literary class, and Shuangmei, Aobai, Pingan and Xiaozai from the martial class. Not only are they intelligent and brave, they also have a tacit understanding. They form the Forbidden City Imperial Cat Room, which protects the national treasures of the world.

title: Me & Roboco Movie
native: 僕とロボコ 劇場版
description:
Robotic OrderMaids are popping up in every household, and 10-year-old Bondo Taira has found out that his two closest friends—Motsuo and Gachi Gorilla—have OrderMaids too. Motsuo, in particular, owns Meico, a beautiful robot that gives excellent massages and serves drinks with a smile. Jealous of his friend, Bondo convinces his mother to get him an OrderMaid, hoping for a similar experience.

However, to Bondo's surprise, the maid that appears outside of his door is incredibly muscular and clumsy enough to destroy a house when completing simple chores. Going by the name Roboko, this new robot is the exact opposite of what Bondo wanted. But despite that, Bondo, together with his friends, learns that there is more to Roboko than they could ever expect.

title: Secrets of the Rivers
titles: San Xian Lun Hui, Sanxian Lunhui, Sanxian Lun Hui, Three-Line Reincarnation, Under the Three Rivers, 三线轮洄, Secrets of the Rivers
description: The Yellow River, Yangtze River, and Lancang River originate from the same source, and three families known as "Water Evils" (Ding, Jiang, and Yi) live along the river. What are "Water Evils"? They can move freely in the water and possess the skills of geomancy, feng shui, and treasure hunting. Yi Sa, the last Water Evil of the Yi family, runs an "underwater bank" business along the Lancang River. During a "Golden Fortress" excavation, Yi Sa encounters and saves Zong Hang. To uncover the truth of what happened and to save himself, Yi Sa trains Zong Hang to become a professional Water Evil, and together with Ding Yudie, a Water Evil from the Ding family, the three enter the "Ancestral Golden Fortress."

title: Twin Martial Spirits
titles: Twin Martial Spirits, The Rise of Twin Souls, Shuangsheng Wu Hun, 双生武魂
description: Lin Fan, who was born in a noble family in Dalin County, was originally a peerless genius who was awarded the Tianjiao Order, but his martial soul was taken away by his fiancée, and he became a waste. When a mysterious demon parasitized Lin Fan and reactivated his abandoned martial soul, making him a rare dual martial soul physique, Lin Fan officially embarked on the road to rise, from a small county town to the heavens and the worlds.

title: Heaven Scrap Master
titles: I Collect Waste in Heaven, Recycling Scrap in the Celestial Court, Wo Zai Tianting Shou Feipin, 我在天庭收废品, Heaven Scrap Master
description: In a modern martial arts world, Zhao Xin unexpectedly inherits the Celestial Realm's recycling station. This grants him not only the aid of numerous immortals but also the admiration of many beauties, ultimately leading him to the pinnacle of martial arts.

title: Aikatsu! x PriPara the Movie: Deai no Kiseki!
alternative: Aikatsu! x PriPara the Movie: Deai no Kiseki!
titles: Aikatsu! x PriPara the Movie: Deai no Kiseki!, アイカツ！×プリパラ THE MOVIE -出会いのキセキ！-
native: アイカツ！×プリパラ THE MOVIE -出会いのキセキ！-
description: Collaboration movie between and .

title: You and Idol Precure♪ Movie
titles: Kimi to Idol Precure♪ Movie: Omatase! Kimi ni Todokeru Kirakki Live!, 映画キミとアイドルプリキュア♪ お待たせ！キミに届けるキラッキライブ！, You and Idol Precure♪ Movie
native: 映画キミとアイドルプリキュア♪（仮）
description: Movie to be released in fall 2025.

title: Celestial Above All
titles: Ling Tian Du Zun, Supreme Over The Sky, 凌天独尊, Celestial Above All
description: Ling Tian, ​​a sword saint of his generation, went against the will of heaven to seize the stele in order to save his beloved, but was plotted against by the way of heaven. When he fell, he perished together with the way of heaven, but was unexpectedly reborn, returning to the moment of his death three hundred years ago when his dantian was completely destroyed and his sword bone was taken away. His beauty is still there, his old enemy is still there, and he has been on the long road to becoming a saint, so why not start over? In this life, he vows to rewrite his destiny and make up for his regrets!

title: Word of Honor 2nd Season
titles: Word of Honor 2nd Season, Jun You Yun II, Jun You Yun 2nd Season, 君有云 第二季, 君有云II, Word of Honor 2
description: Xie Kanhua was about to be executed in the Shanglin Celestial Palace. When Su Baiyi was rescuing him, the Shanglin Celestial Palace disintegrated, and Su Baiyi was taken away by Su Jian, the Demon Lord who had voluntarily confined himself in the secluded prison for twenty years. Then the Hero Conference of Xuanwei Town is held again, Bai Jile lures Divine Official Xue, the second-best martial artist in the world to participate, plunging the martial arts world into chaos. In order to save the injured Nangong Xi'er, Su Baiyi went to the North Kunlun with Su Jian to pay a visit to Su Suomo, the ancestor of the Su family, while Yuling and Feng Zuojun respectively headed to Qingcheng Mountain and the Demon Town to learn martial arts. Under the latent tension, the Yingzhou Immortal Island reappeared. The invaders from the island issued a provocation to the martial artists, saying that those who submit will prosper, while those who resist will perish...

title: Nobody
titles: Langlang Shan Xiao Yaoguai, 浪浪山小妖怪, Nobody
description: Can one embark on a journey to the West without extraordinary abilities? A little pig demon decides to leave Langlang Mountain and team up with a toad demon, a weasel demon, and a gorilla monster to complete their pilgrimage. What trials will the little demons encounter on their westward journey? Will they ultimately be able to achieve their wishes and live the lives they desire?

title: Soul of the Dragon
titles: 龙神万相之龙魂, Long Shen Wan Xiang: Long Hun, Long Hun, 龙魂, Soul of the Dragon
description: For millennia, the ancient and mysterious Dragon Clan has thrived on the Central Continent. Yet the struggle between the Light and Dark Souls of the Divine Realm drags the dragons into conflict. The clan is torn apart by brutal civil strife, facing the threat of extinction. In this desperate hour, Ao Xue, the long-absent prince of the East Sea, returns with formidable power, determined to save the Dragon Clan from peril.

title: Little Shark's Outings
alternative: Odekake Kozame Movie: Tokai no Otomodachi
titles: Little Shark's Outings, Outgoing Baby Shark, Little Shark's Day Out, Odekake Kozame Movie: Tokai no Otomodachi, 映画 おでかけ子ザメ とかいのおともだち
native: 映画 おでかけ子ザメ とかいのおともだち
description: Movie of .

title: Little Fairy Yao
titles: Xiao Xian Zhiyao, 小仙之瑶, Little Fairy Yao
description: He Wan, the leader of the Hidden Clan feared by all three realms, suddenly attacked the Heavenly Palace. The Supreme God Nan Ze came to fight. In order to protect Nan Ze, the jade-growing fairy Yu Zhiyao risked her life to save him. When she and He Wan were about to perish together, she was unexpectedly reborn. By mistake, Yu Zhiyao was reborn into He Wan's body. After the rebirth, He Wan's Hidden Power was greatly damaged. Ting Zhao, the Hidden Guard of the West Sea, came to help the leader He Wan recover her Hidden Power. Since then, Zhiyao was forced to embark on the road of a two-faced female leader, pretending to be majestic in front of others and being charming in front of the king...

title: Swallowing the Heavens
titles: Tun Tian Ji, 吞天记, Swallowing the Heavens
description: depicts the legendary transformation of the young Wu Yu from a mortal to an immortal Buddha.

title: Natsume's Book of Friends Season 7 Special
description: As a young child, Takashi Natsume believed his ability to see youkai to be nothing but a curse. Now a high school student, Natsume has managed to heal from his old wounds and form unbreakable bonds with humans and youkai alike. Natsume's newfound friendships—including the one with his spirit bodyguard Madara, nicknamed "Nyanko-sensei"—are often interlaced with his duty to return the names of the spirits written inside the Book of Friends, his late grandmother Reiko's keepsake. While more remarkable youkai reach out to him, Natsume discovers that he still has much to learn about the world that surrounds him.

title: Candle in the Tomb: South Sea Tomb
titles: 南海归墟, Gui Chuideng: Nanhai Gui Xu, 鬼吹灯之南海归墟, Candle in the Tomb: South Sea Tomb
description: Hu Bayi and his companions, commissioned by Professor Chen, travel to Coral Temple Island in the South China Sea and hire Ruan Hei and his apprentice to embark on the Trident to search for the Qin Emperor's Bone Mirror. After their adventure, they crash into Guixu, where they discover the ancient mirror within the shipwreck and learn that Ruan Hei is Duoling's enemy. While resting after their escape, a mysterious figure suddenly appears, wielding a club, approaching Uncle Ming, who is on night watch.

title: The Ruins of Kunlun Linglong
titles: Huangshen Lu: Linglong Shan, 荒神录之玲珑山, The Ruins of Kunlun Linglong

title: Little Shark's Outings x Nights with a Cat Manner Movie
alternative: Odekake Kozame Movie: Tokai no Otomodachi x Yoru wa Neko to Issho Manner Eizou
titles: Little Shark's Outings x Nights with a Cat Manner Movie, Odekake Kozame Movie: Tokai no Otomodachi x Yoru wa Neko to Issho Manner Eizou, 映画 おでかけ子ザメ とかいのおともだち x 夜は猫といっしょ マナー映像
native: 映画 おでかけ子ザメ とかいのおともだち x 夜は猫といっしょ マナー映像
description: A manner movie collaboration between and which was shown before theater screenings of .

title: I am "Yingtai"
titles: I am "Yingtai", Zaixia "Yingtai", 在下“英台”, In the Name of Ying Tai
description: The 2025 Chinese comic series with a heroine as the lead is coming, watch the academy team solve the chaos in the court!

title: Divine Manifestation
titles: Tian Xiang, 天相, Divine Manifestation
description: Fifteen years ago, Luofeng City was struck by a bizarre catastrophe, becoming a dead and silent ruin overnight. The young Ding Xiao, born at the age of seven, was granted a place in the Town Spirit Division. However, he destroyed his own spirit and became a coffin carrier for the Gui Tribe. For five years, he experienced the vicissitudes of life. Unexpectedly, he awakened his physiognomy in the face of adversity, excelled in the promotion assessment, and became a feared figure in the Spirit Division. Now, evil spirits are rising in all directions, and strange events are endless. To cure his sister Ding Ling's increasingly strange illness, Ding Xiao resolutely restarts his spiritual awakening journey, only to be drawn into an unfathomable vortex of political intrigue. The hidden truth of Luofeng City gradually unfolds, and behind all this, the fate of Ding Ling is inextricably intertwined...

title: Punirunes: Puni 3
titles: Punirunes: Puni 3, ぷにるんず ぷに3
description: The anime follows the daily life of PuniRunes—mysterious creatures who love to be coddled—and Yuka, a fourth-grade girl who loves soft, squishy things.

title: Tales of Demons and Gods Season 7
description: Seventh season of .

title: A War between Humans and AI
titles: Pause! Zhixu Reorganization, Zanting! Zhi Xu Chongzu, 暂停！智序重组, A War between Humans and AI
description: On an unknown continent, there is a city called Satellite City No. 9. In this city, a screw straightening worker named Rui Li at the screw factory gradually realizes the unreality of the city in her monotonous daily work. With the help of a mysterious character named "Anull", Rui Li gains the superpower of "transformation" and becomes the thief "Sirius", secretly taking action to escape from here. When the truth of the world finally unfolds before her eyes, Rui Li discovers that her real battle has just begun.

title: Nirvana of Storm Rider
titles: Fengyun Bian, 风云变, Nirvana of Storm Rider
description: It tells the story of the top warriors Bu Jingyun and Nie Feng. In order to cope with a catastrophe that was about to sweep the entire world, they transformed into quantum states with the help of unknown seniors and mysterious extraterrestrial visitors, and their whereabouts are unknown. Three thousand years later, an asteroid hit the earth, turning the surface into a barbaric wasteland.  Human beings trapped underground gradually discovered that there is a super power known as "pulse energy" in the human body. Bu Tianyun, an orphan from Dungeon 32, accidentally awakened Bu Jingyun who was sleeping in the meteorite. From then on, he discovered the "pulse energy" potential in his body, and together with Nie Feng's successor Nie Zifeng, embarked on the journey to become " The journey of training as a "pulse warrior" and fighting to protect the world.

title: Help!!
description: Music video for the song Help!! by Kobo Kanaeru.

title: My WeChat Connects to the Dragon Palace
alternative: Wo de Wei Xin Tong Longgong
titles: My WeChat is Longgong, My WeChat is connected to Dragon Palace, Wo de Wei Xin Tong Longgong, 我的微信通龙宫, My WeChat Connects to the Dragon Palace
description: Luo Yun, an orphan boy, has a mysterious background. When he became an adult, he was accidentally pulled into the "East China Sea Dragon Palace Chat Group". After exchanging cultivation secrets from the immortal friends in the group, his cultivation level increased greatly. Since then, he has transformed into "Luo Yuan Shangxian" and started his journey of cultivating immortals between the human and immortal worlds.  Relying on the information gap and witty planning of the immortal friends in the WeChat group, Luo Yun exchanged spicy strips for immortal pills and cola for spiritual treasures, constantly improving himself, helping the weak and upholding justice in the real world. As the Overlord Seafood Company rose all the way in the two worlds, Luo Yun was involved in the great dispute between Peach Blossom Spring and Chaos Star Sea because of the mystery of his life experience.

title: Guan Hai Ce Zhi Tie Qi Xiong Guan
alternative: Guan Hai Ce Zhi Tie Qi Xiong Guan
titles: Guan Hai Ce 2nd Season, Strategies of Sea Observation 2, Guan Hai Ce: Tie Qi Xiong Guan, 观海策 第二季, 观海策之铁骑雄关
description: Second season of Guan Hai Ce.

title: Little Astro Boy
description:
Astro Boy appears to be a normal, playful kid, yet he is a robot capable of both flying and incredible strength. Living with his parents in a small town where humans and robots coexist, he has many friends thanks to his cheerful nature. Eager to learn and try new things, Astro and his companions often embark on exciting adventures. But their explorations are met with unexpected troubles when the wicked criminal Hamegg—joined by his accomplices Gora, a pink gorilla robot, and Professor Flau—interferes with their endeavors. 

As the little robot boy and his group bravely face challenges, their efforts become part of a journey to discover the world's values and wonders.

description: Kakuei Kakkun Tanaka is a superhero who hangs out with his friends. In his misadventures, he becomes prime minister of Japan, visits New York and prevents a nuclear war.

title: Kongjwi & Patjwi
titles: Kongjwi and Patjwi, Kongjui & Patchui, Kongjwi & Patjwi, Kongjui & Patchui, 콩쥐 팥쥐
description: Kongjui, who had been living alone with her father, welcomes a stepmother and a stepsister called Patchui into her life. When her father is out, the stepmother and Patchui make her do all the housework and the stepmother believes all of Patchui's lies and beats Kongjui mercilessly. When talks of marriage between Kongjui and the son of a respectable family come out one day, the stepmother does everything in her power to get Patchui married to the young man. Unaware of her stepmother's plans, Kongjui runs into the young man in the woods and the two fall in love.

title: Ever Night
titles: 将夜 Jiang Ye; Ever Night
description:
After traveling to what appears to be a true Tang Dynasty world, the main character Ning Que discovers that it is actually a perilous agricultural world. He first believed that he could become superior and live a luxurious lifestyle, but he discovers that he lacks cultivation skills. He was also persecuted for thousands of miles and saw his entire family massacred when he was four years old. He discovered the baby Sangsang while he was running away from death and picked up a black umbrella in a sea of blood and dead. He discovered the will to live in despair. He takes the large black umbrella and Sangsang and launches an exciting counterattack, refusing to submit to fate.

(Source: bilibili)

In order to fulfill his dream, Meng Qi decides to cooperate with the demon girl Liya and help her shoot a demon themed movie. However, as the shooting progresses, Meng Qi discovers that things in the other world are closely related to him...(Source: Bilibili, translated)

title: Ki ni Natteru Hito ga Otoko ja Nakatta
alternative: Ki ni Natteru Hito ga Otoko ja Nakatta
titles: The Guy She Was Interested In Wasn't a Guy at All, The Person She Fell For Wasn't A Boy, TGSWIIWAGAA, Kinioto
native: 気になってる人が男じゃなかった
description:
Fashionable and upbeat high schooler Aya falls head over heels for an employee at a local CD shop. He's got an air of mystery about him, great style, and an impeccable music taste. Little does she know—this supposedly male employee is actually her female classmate Mitsuki! Mitsuki generally keeps to herself, but since her seat is right next to Aya's, she can't help but be extremely aware of the other's crush. Revealing the truth is out of the question for Mitsuki—but perhaps getting closer to Aya wouldn't be so bad...

(Source: Yen Press)

title: Omniscient Reader
alternative: Zenchiteki na Dokusha no Shiten kara
titles: Jeonjijeok Dokja Sijeom, 전지적 독자 시점, Omniscient Reader's Viewpoint, ORV
native: 全知的な読者の視点から
description:
Dokja was an average office worker whose sole interest was reading his favorite web novel 'Three Ways to Survive the Apocalypse.' But when the novel suddenly becomes reality, he is the only person who knows how the world will end. Armed with this realization, Dokja uses his understanding to change the course of the story, and the world, as he knows it.

(Source: Crunchyroll)

title: Witch on the Holy Night
titles: Witch on the Holy Night, Mahoyo
description:
Near the end of the Showa era in the late 1980s, in Misaki town, an old mansion is rumored to be the home of a witch. After moving into the mansion, Aoko Aozaki begins to learn sorcery from a young mage, Alice Kuonji, the rumored witch of the mansion. The Aozaki family oversees the land on which Misaki is built and the heir (Aoko) is tasked with protecting it.

Mysterious intruders have been disrupting the bounded field in Misaki, leading Alice and Aoko to investigate. A mannequin or puppet attacks them and is incinerated. As this happens, both of them spot someone running away, a civilian who must not get away having seen magic alive.

Unexpectedly, a young boy named Soujuurou Shizuki is drawn to the mansion and comes to reside with them as well.

alternative: Tensei Akujo no Kuro Rekishi OAD
titles: The Reincarnated Villainess' Dark History
native: 転生悪女の黒歴史 OAD
description: Specials of The Dark History of the Reincarnated Villainess. Iana wants to surprise Yomi with a cake for his birthday, but when the kitchen blows up again, he forbids her from entering. She comes up with a new plan, but Yomi gets the wrong idea about it. When Iana comes down with a cold, she remembers being Satou in middle school and having to nurse herself back to health with no company but her imaginary allies. As Iana, things are different. Or are they?
